script.text:
はぁ、はぁ……
今夜のライブ、大成功でしたーっ！

translations.en:
Haa‚ haa…
Tonight's live was a great success!

script.text:
うん、ファンとの一体感が凄かったよね！
今回は特に、私達へのコールも沢山あったし

translations.en:
Yeah‚ the unity with the fans was amazing!
Especially this time‚ there were a lot of calls for us.

script.text:
当然だよ！　こころと愛はとっくに
LizNoirの立派なメンバーなんだから～

translations.en:
Of course! Kokoro and Ai have long been…
…valuable members of LizNoir~

script.text:
特にこころは、すでに事実上のセンター！
と言っても過言じゃないしね

translations.en:
Especially Kokoro‚ she's practically the center!
It's not an exaggeration to say that.

script.text:
新生LizNoirは
私、赤崎こころが引っ張ります！

translations.en:
The new LizNoir…
…will be led by me‚ Kokoro Akasaki!

script.text:
またこころは調子に乗って……
歌もダンスもまだまだ先輩達にはかなわないよ

translations.en:
Kokoro‚ you're getting carried away…
Your singing and dancing still can't match the senpais.

script.text:
愛、そんな弱気じゃ、いつまで経っても
先輩達には追い付けないよ？

translations.en:
Ai‚ with such a timid attitude‚ you'll never catch up to the senpais.
You know that‚ right?

script.text: 私はとてもそんな強気にはなれないなあ……

translations.en: I can't be as confident as you…

script.text:
仕方ないな～。じゃあ、今後のリズノワについての
作戦会議も兼ねて、打ち上げしない？

translations.en:
I guess that can't be helped. How about we have a celebration?
It can also serve as a strategy meeting for LizNoir's future.

script.text: あっ、いいね！　先輩達も誘って、楽しくやろうよ

translations.en: Ah‚ sounds good! Let's invite the senpais too and have fun.

script.text:
じゃ、こころが二人に声を掛けて来るから
愛はここで待っててね

translations.en:
Alright‚ I'll go talk to the two of them.
Ai‚ wait here.

script.text: 愛が失言して莉央さんを怒らせるといけないから～

translations.en: We don't want you to say something wrong and make Rio-san angry~

script.text: ……いつも失言してるのはこころの方でしょ

translations.en: …Isn't it usually you who says something wrong‚ Kokoro?

script.text:
先輩達は楽屋に……うん、戻ってきてるみたい
……ん？　何か真剣な声で話してるような……

translations.en:
The senpais are in the dressing room… Hmm‚ looks like they've returned.
…Huh? It sounds like they're having a serious conversation…

script.text:
葵！　ライブ中、一度転びかけたでしょ！？
怪我してるんじゃない？

translations.en:
Aoi! During the live‚ you almost stumbled‚ right?
Are you injured?

script.text:
違うよ。シューズの底がすり減って滑っただけ
とっさにカバーしたのに……莉央は目ざといね

translations.en:
No‚ it's not like that. The soles of my shoes were worn out‚ so I slipped.
I covered it up quickly… Rio‚ you're observant‚ aren't you?

script.text:
……私、自分のことで精一杯で、気付きもしなかった
お客さんも気付いていないはず……莉央さん凄い……

translations.en:
…I was so preoccupied with myself that I didn't even notice.
The audience shouldn't have noticed either… Rio-san is amazing…

script.text: ……本当に怪我じゃないのね？　葵

translations.en: …So it really wasn't an injury‚ Aoi?

script.text:
ホントだってば、莉央は心配性だな
ほら、よく見て。なんともないから

translations.en:
I'm telling you‚ it's true. Rio‚ you worry too much.
Look closely. I'm perfectly fine.

script.text:
良かった……。でも心配もするわ
貴方には“前科”があるんだから。忘れたの？

translations.en:
I'm relieved… But I still worry.
You do have a "Ex-con‚" you know. Did you forget?

script.text: え？　前科？

translations.en: Eh? Ex-con?

script.text: むぎゃあっ！？

translations.en: Gyaa!

script.text: きゃあっ！？

translations.en: Kyaa!

script.text: 莉央！　危ないっ！

translations.en: Rio! It's dangerous!

script.text: 大丈夫？

translations.en: Are you okay?

script.text: それに君も

translations.en: And you too.

script.text:
僕らがまだ二人だった頃の話じゃないか
よく覚えてたね、莉央

translations.en:
Isn't this a story from when it was just the two of us?
You remembered it well‚ Rio.

script.text:
もう！　当たり前でしょ！！
……あんなことはこりごりよ

translations.en:
Geez! Of course‚ I remember!!
…I'm so done with that kind of thing.

script.text: ……あの時、葵さんが、怪我を……？

translations.en: …At that time‚ Aoi-san‚ you got injured…?

script.text:
……わ、私……なんてことを……
……もしかして、グランプリでリズノワが負けたのって

translations.en:
…M-me… What have I done…
…Could it be that LizNoir lost in the Grand Prix because of that?

script.text:
こころーっ！
遅いよ、待ちきれないから来ちゃったよ
……？　こころ？　どうしたの？

translations.en:
Kokoro!
You're late‚ I couldn't wait so I came here.
…? Kokoro? What's wrong?

script.text:
ごめん、こころは急に用事が出来ちゃいました！
……打ち上げは三人でやって！　ではっ！

translations.en:
Sorry‚ something came up suddenly for me!
…Do the celebration without me‚ the three of you! Bye!

script.text:
え？　ちょっ、ちょっと待ってよ、こころ！
行っちゃった……も～！！

translations.en:
Eh? Wait‚ Kokoro‚ wait a moment!
She left… Ugh!!

script.text:
こら、廊下で騒いじゃダメよ
早く中に入りなさい

translations.en:
Hey‚ don't make a ruckus in the hallway.
Hurry and come inside.

script.text: あれ？　愛、一人？

translations.en: Huh? Ai‚ alone?

script.text:
はい。こころも今の今までいたんですけど
急用が出来たって、走ってどこか行っちゃいました

translations.en:
Yes. Kokoro was here until just now‚
but she suddenly had something important to do and ran off somewhere.

script.text:
急用？　何かしら？
この後、一緒に打ち上げしようと思っていたのに

translations.en:
Something important? I wonder what it is?
We were planning to celebrate together afterwards.
(…Don't tell me…)

script.text: ――翌日

translations.en: ―― The next day

script.text: ……こころ？　ねえ、こころ、どうしたの？

translations.en: …Kokoro? Hey‚ Kokoro‚ what's wrong?

script.text: ――えっ？　な、何？

translations.en: Eh? W-What?

script.text:
何って
今朝からずっとため息ばっかりついてるじゃない

translations.en:
What do you mean by what?
You've been sighing all day since this morning.

script.text:
そうよ、顔色も良くないわ
何かあったのなら、私達に話しなさい

translations.en:
That's right‚ your complexion doesn't look good either.
If something happened‚ tell us.

script.text:
ねえ、こころ
もしかして、昨日――

translations.en:
Hey‚ Kokoro.
Could it be‚ yesterday――

script.text:
い、いえいえ！　こころは全然元気ですよ～
昨日のライブの興奮が抜けなくて、少し寝不足なだけで

translations.en:
N-No‚ no! Kokoro is totally fine~!
I just can't calm down from the excitement of yesterday's live‚ so I'm a little sleep-deprived‚ that's all.

script.text:
ほら、見て下さい！
このきらきらアイドルスマイルを！

translations.en:
Look‚ see!
This sparkling idol smile!

script.text:
いつものわざとらしさがない
やっぱり、おかしいな

translations.en:
It lacks the usual artificialness.
Something is definitely off.

script.text:
そうね、普段はもっとイラっとするくらい
媚び媚びの笑顔だわ

translations.en:
That's right‚ it's usually more irritating.
It's a sycophantic smile.

script.text:
イラっとするってなんですか～っ！？
さらっと酷いことを言わないで下さい～っ！

translations.en:
What do you mean by irritating!?
Don't casually say mean things!

script.text:
ふふ、やっと元気が出てきたわね
じゃあ、次の仕事の話をしましょうか

translations.en:
Hehe‚ you finally seem to be feeling better.
Well then‚ shall we talk about the next job?

script.text:
それって、毎年沢山の事務所からアイドルが出る
バレンタインのイベントですよね？

translations.en:
That's the Valentine's event where many idols from
various agencies participate every year‚ right?

script.text:
いつも断ってたやつ？　正直、僕はあまり興味ないな
甘いチョコのイメージは僕らになじまないと思うし

translations.en:
The one we always declined? Honestly‚ I'm not very interested.
I don't think the image of sweet chocolate suits us.

script.text:
そうね、大きなイベントではあるけど……
私達らしさをなくしてまで出演することはないかしら

translations.en:
That's right‚ it's a big event‚ but…
I wonder if it's worth participating if we have to lose our uniqueness.

script.text:
そ……そうですね、私達の楽曲は
バレンタインっぽいもの、ないですし

translations.en:
Y-Yeah‚ our songs…
We don't have anything that's Valentine-like.

script.text:
ちょっと残念ですけど
このお仕事はなしということで――

translations.en:
Even it's a bit disappointing‚
let's decline this job――

script.text:
待って下さい！　このイベントには他の事務所から
ライバルグループも沢山出演するじゃないですか

translations.en:
Wait a moment! In this event‚ there are other rival groups
from different agencies participating‚ right?

script.text:
出演を辞退したら、逃げたみたいに見られちゃいます
こころは、リズノワがそんな風に思われるのは嫌です

translations.en:
If we decline the offer‚ it will seem like we're running away.
Kokoro doesn't want LizNoir to be seen that way.

script.text: ――こころ？

translations.en: ――Kokoro?

script.text:
それに、せっかくのチャンスをみすみす逃すなんて
もったいないんじゃありませんか！

translations.en:
Besides‚ to let this opportunity slip away
‚ isn't it a waste?

script.text:
こころの意見も一理あるけど……愛も言ったでしょ？
バレンタイン曲が、今の私達にはないのよ

translations.en:
Kokoro's opinion has a point‚ but… Didn't Ai say it too?
We don't have a Valentine's song that suits us right now.

script.text:
うーん……バレンタインってよく分からないしなぁ
僕、毎年もらってばかりだから……

translations.en:
Hmm… I don't really understand Valentine's anyway.
I've always been the one receiving it every year…

script.text:
それなら、こころがLizNoirらしい
バレンタイン曲を企画してみせます～

translations.en:
In that case‚ Kokoro will show a LizNoir-like…
Valentine's song!

script.text:
そんな曲があれば、私達のファン層も広がりますよ？
アイドルの頂点に、また一歩前進です！

translations.en:
If we have such a song‚ our fan base will expand‚ right?
It's another step forward towards the pinnacle of idols!

script.text: ……こころがそこまで言うなら、僕は反対しないよ

translations.en: …If Kokoro says so‚ I won't object.

script.text:
……分かったわ。でも時間はあまりないわよ
それにステージで歌う以上、一切妥協はしない

translations.en:
…Understood. But we don't have much time.
And if we're going to sing on stage‚ we won't compromise at all.

script.text: 出来が悪ければ不採用。それでもやるのね？

translations.en: If it's not good enough‚ we won't be chosen. Are you still going to do it?

script.text:
はい！　ビッグシップに乗ったつもりで
お待ちくださ～～い！

translations.en:
Yes! Just think you all on a big ship.
and wait for my sailing~!

script.text:
分かったわ、{user}さんには
出演の返事は待ってくれるよう伝えておく

translations.en:
Understood. I'll ask {user}-san
to let them wait for our response regarding the event.

script.text:
（……なんだろう、いつも前向きなこころだけど）
（今回は少し違う気がする……）

translations.en:
(…I wonder what's wrong. Kokoro is usually so positive.)
(This time‚ it feels a bit different…)
